_schema.op: string identifier of the op (matches the folder name)
_schema.dtype: reference / output dtype shared by all cases: bf16 | f16
_schema.default_params: params shared by all cases; per-case keys override these
_schema.default_params.a_dtype: FlyDSL activation quant dtype (fp4 = mxfp4 float4_e2m1fn_x2)
_schema.default_params.b_dtype: FlyDSL weight quant dtype (fp4 = mxfp4 float4_e2m1fn_x2)
_schema.default_params.quant_type: quantization scheme used to build kernel inputs (per_1x32, e8m0 block scales)
_schema.default_params.block_m: MoE sorting block size; also stage1/stage2 tile_m
_schema.cases: list of shape entries; each must define name, tokens, model_dim, inter_dim, experts, topk
_schema.cases[].name: unique label for the case
_schema.cases[].tokens: number of input tokens (rows of hidden_states)
_schema.cases[].model_dim: model/hidden dim D; must be divisible by tile_k
_schema.cases[].inter_dim: intermediate dim I; 2*I must be divisible by tile_n
_schema.cases[].source: AITER config CSV (and model) the row was taken from

description: fused MoE: route topk experts, gate/up GEMM (w1) + silu-gated activation, down GEMM (w2), weighted combine across topk
